recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: Eraserhead
recommendations.overview: First-time father Henry Spencer tries to survive his industrial environment, his angry girlfriend, and the unbearable screams of his newly born mutant child.

recommendations.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
recommendations.overview: An attention-craving mother nearing 50, unemployed and living with her pregnant daughter and son-in-law, suddenly finds herself with child, too...

recommendations.title: Strange but True
recommendations.overview: A woman surprises the family of her deceased boyfriend by telling them she's pregnant with his child.

recommendations.title: Prevenge
recommendations.overview: A pregnant widow, believing herself to be guided by her unborn child, embarks on a homicidal rampage.

recommendations.title: Bed Rest
recommendations.overview: After struggling to start a family, Julie Rivers becomes pregnant and moves into a new home with her husband. She's ordered to mandatory bed rest, and begins seeing ghostly happenings throughout the house.

recommendations.title: Onibaba
recommendations.overview: While her son, Kichi, is away at war, a woman and her daughter-in-law survive by killing samurai who stray into their swamp, then selling whatever valuables they find. Both are devastated when they learn that Kichi has died, but his wife soon begins

recommendations.title: Pan's Labyrinth
recommendations.overview: In post–civil war Spain, 10-year-old Ofelia moves with her pregnant mother to live under the control of her cruel stepfather. Drawn into a mysterious labyrinth, she meets a faun who reveals that she may be a lost princess from an underground kingdom.

recommendations.title: Blood Fest
recommendations.overview: Fans flock to a festival celebrating the most iconic horror movies, only to discover that the charismatic showman behind the event has a diabolical agenda.

recommendations.title: The Happiness of the Katakuris
recommendations.overview: The Katakuri family has just opened their guest house in the mountains. Unfortunately their first guest commits suicide and in order to avoid trouble they decide to bury him in the backyard. Things get way more complicated when their second guest, a
